name: Nordic Fighter
notes:
Nordic Fighter is a leading provider of premium gym equipment and fitness solutions, catering to both commercial and private markets across the Nordic region. With a strong commitment to quality and innovation, we empower athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and businesses with the tools they need to achieve their goals.

In addition to our core business, Nordic Fighter offers infrastructure services, including Virtual Machine (VM) rentals and co-location units. Our data center solutions provide secure, scalable, and reliable hosting options for businesses and individuals looking to enhance their digital operations.
